action_contract: Binary recorded diuretic exposure; vasodilator exposure may be pre-action context only when it ends before t.
anchor_contract: Completed prior-encounter heart-failure diagnosis followed by the first current ICU diuretic or vasodilator event; no current-admission diagnosis, medication-defined disease, or generic volume-overload fallback.
claim_boundary: Recorded-trajectory forecasting and benchmark-validity auditing only. Treatment, causal, counterfactual, policy-selection, clinical-utility, deployment, and autonomous-decision claims are blocked.
state_interval: Fully contained pre-action four-hour history bins ending before t; prior completed-encounter evidence may be included as a fixed flag.
target_interval: Observed physiology values, masks, and recencies in [t+4h,t+8h).
